basic_details.job_title: PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Paschim Gujarat Vij Company (PGVCL) Company Secretary Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Paschim Gujarat Vij Company pgvcl.com. A total of 1 Company Secretary vacancy has been announced through the PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 40 years (5 years relaxation for Reserved Candidates)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for Reserved Candidates

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate with Membership of ICSI and LL.B.
qualification.details: Company Secretary: Any Graduate with Membership of ICSI and LL.B. Experience: Minimum of 5 (five) years' post qualification experience (ACS) having served as a Company Secretary in a Public Limited Company with an annual turnover of ₹300 Crores or above OR Minimum of 5 (five) years' post qualification experience (ACS) having served as a Company Secretary in a State/Central Public Sector Undertaking with an annual turnover of ₹100 Crores or above.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: Rs. 72,000 – 1,19,400/- Other Benefits: As available to regular employees

selection_process: Shortlisting of candidates Selection and subsequent appointment governed by Company rules
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.pgvcl.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Company Secretary Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PGVCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PGVCL Company Secretary Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Company Secretary: Any Graduate with Membership of ICSI and LL.B. Experience: Minimum of 5 (five) years' post qualification experience (ACS) having served as a Company Secretary in a Public Limited Company with an annual turnover of ₹300 Crores or above OR Minimum of 5 (five) years' post qualification experience (ACS) having served as a Company Secretary in a State/Central Public Sector Undertaking with an annual turnover of ₹100 Crores or above.

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for Reserved Candidates

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Salary Details
content_sections.text: Pay Scale: Rs. 72,000 – 1,19,400/- Other Benefits: As available to regular employees

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of candidates Selection and subsequent appointment governed by Company rules

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.pgvcl.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGVCL Company Secretary post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PGVCL Company Secretary post is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the mentioned address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Company Secretary position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Any Graduate with a Membership of ICSI and possess an LL.B. degree to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the PGVCL Company Secretary recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Company Secretary post is 40 years. A relaxation of 5 years is provided for reserved category candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Company Secretary role at PGVCL?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 72,000 to Rs. 1,19,400 per month, along with other applicable benefits.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Company Secretary post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Company Secretary in Paschim Gujarat Vij Company (PGVCL).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required experience for the Company Secretary post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of post-qualification experience as a Company Secretary in a Public Limited Company with a turnover of ₹300 Crores or above, or in a State/Central Public Sector Undertaking with a turnover of ₹100 Crores or above is required.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of PGVCL, which is www.pgvcl.com.

faq.question: Q9. How should the application be sent?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent by RPAD (Registered Post with Acknowledgement Due) or Speed Post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach photocopies of documents related to qualifications, age, experience, company turnover, and present job profile, along with a recent passport-size photograph.
